steps: UX creates a converter element inside VirtualIn with AI, I, AQ, Q connectors
Block input gets <In Input="aq-uuid"/> pointing to the converter AQ connector
Original Q and Qm connectors on VirtualIn remain unchanged
Converter AQ UUID has byte pattern 02ff in position 8-9
wiring_pattern.important: XML-injected wiring using Q connector UUID does NOT work. Must use AQ from converter.

reading_outputs.description: How to read block output values

methods./sps/state/{uuid}: Returns status code (always 5), NOT the actual value
methods./sps/io/{uuid}/state: Works for VirtualIn, VirtualOut, and StateV (Virtual Status)
methods.WebSocket ValueState: Only broadcasts control UUIDs from LoxAPP3.json, not block connectors

reading_outputs.solution: Wire block output Q → StateV (Virtual Status) input, read via /sps/io/{statev-uuid}/state
